title: Operator pattern | Kubernetes
snippet: Operators are software extensions to Kubernetes that make use of [custom resources](/docs/concepts/extend-kubernetes/api-extension/custom-resources/) to manage applications and their components. The operator pattern captures how you can write code to automate a task beyond what Kubernetes itself provides. ## Operators in Kubernetes. Kubernetes' [operator pattern](/docs/concepts/extend-kubernetes/operator/ "A specialized controller used to manage a custom resource") concept lets you extend the cluster's behaviour without modifying the code of Kubernetes itself by linking [controllers](/docs/concepts/architecture/controller/ "A control loop that watches the shared state of the cluster through the apiserver and makes changes attempting to move the current state towards the desired state.") to one or more custom resources. Operators are clients of the Kubernetes API that act as controllers for a [Custom Resource](/docs/concepts/extend-kubernetes/api-extension/custom-resources/). ## Deploying operators. ## Using an operator. * [Kopf](https://github.com/nolar/kopf) (Kubernetes Operator Pythonic Framework). * Read an [article](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/containers-kubernetes/best-practices-for-building-kubernetes-operators-and-stateful-apps) from Google Cloud about best practices for building operators. Last modified July 16, 2025 at 4:16 PM PST: [docs(operators): update URI to KubeOps (0582e5805a)](https://github.com/kubernetes/website/commit/0582e5805a671e8facdf500bbda0da84be07f810).

page_summary: Operator模式是Kubernetes中用于封装、部署和管理复杂应用的一种方法。它通过自定义资源（CR）和控制器（Controller）扩展Kubernetes API，以自动化特定应用或服务的操作。控制器负责将CR所描述的应用实际状态不断调整至其声明的期望状态。

title: Kubernetes Operators: what are they? Some examples
snippet: Operators are patterns that extend the behavior of the cluster without changing the Kubernetes code. Its APIs act as custom resource controllers.

page_summary: Kubernetes Operators 是封装了领域知识的软件扩展，用于自动化管理 Kubernetes 应用及其组件。它们通过自定义资源（CR）和控制器来实现，控制器会监视 CR 的状态并采取行动使其与期望状态一致。Operator 模式将运维知识编码到软件中，从而自动化复杂的任务，如配置、备份、升级和故障恢复。
